parameters.functionCode:
const input = $items("Set Input Defaults")[0].json;
const rulesText = (input.rules_text || '')
  .replace(/[ \t]+/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
  .trim();
if (!rulesText) {
  throw new Error('rules_text is required');
}
const project = input.project_name || 'default-project';
const fewShot = [
  'Example input: "Maximum height of each building must be at most 75 m."',
  'Example output:',
  '',
  "MERGE (C_Building:Class {iri: 'ex:Building'})",
  "SET C_Building.label = 'Building', C_Building.project = '" + project + "', C_Building.graph = 'OntoGraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (DP_H:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:hasHeightM'})",
  "SET DP_H.SWRL_label = 'hasHeightM', DP_H.range = 'xsd:decimal', DP_H.project = '" + project + "', DP_H.graph = 'OntoGraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (B_gt:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:greaterThan'})",
  "SET B_gt.label = 'greaterThan', B_gt.project = '" + project + "', B_gt.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (DP_V:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:violatesMaxHeight'})",
  "SET DP_V.SWRL_label = 'violatesMaxHeight', DP_V.range = 'xsd:boolean', DP_V.project = '" + project + "', DP_V.graph = 'OntoGraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (r:Rule {Rule_Id: 'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V'})",
  "SET r.text = 'Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)^swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)', r.kind = 'violation', r.project = '" + project + "', r.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (vb:Var {name: '?b'}) SET vb.project = '" + project + "', vb.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (vh:Var {name: '?h'}) SET vh.project = '" + project + "', vh.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (lit75:Literal {lex: '75', datatype: 'xsd:decimal'}) SET lit75.project = '" + project + "', lit75.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (litT:Literal {lex: 'true', datatype: 'xsd:boolean'}) SET litT.project = '" + project + "', litT.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (a1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A1'})",
  "SET a1.type = 'ClassAtom', a1.iri = 'ex:Building', a1.SWRL_label = 'Building', a1.project = '" + project + "', a1.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (a2:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A2'})",
  "SET a2.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', a2.iri = 'ex:hasHeightM', a2.SWRL_label = 'hasHeightM', a2.project = '" + project + "', a2.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (a3:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_A3'})",
  "SET a3.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a3.iri = 'swrlb:greaterThan', a3.SWRL_label = 'greaterThan', a3.project = '" + project + "', a3.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  "MERGE (h1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V_H1'})",
  "SET h1.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', h1.iri = 'ex:violatesMaxHeight', h1.SWRL_label = 'violatesMaxHeight', h1.project = '" + project + "', h1.graph = 'Metagraph'",
  '',
  "MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 1}]->(a1)",
  "MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 2}]->(a2)",
  "MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 3}]->(a3)",
  "MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {`order`: 1}]->(h1)",
  '',
  'MERGE (a1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(C_Building)',
  'MERGE (a2)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_H)',
  'MERGE (a3)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_gt)',
  'MERGE (h1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_V)',
  '',
  "MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vb)",
  "MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vb)",
  "MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(vh)",
  "MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vh)",
  "MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(lit75)",
  "MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vb)",
  "MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litT);"
].join('\n');
const prompt = [
  'Convert design rules into Neo4j Cypher MERGE + SET statements. Output Cypher only, no JSON, no markdown fences.',
  '',
  'SCHEMA CONSTRAINTS (v3):',
  '- Allowed node labels: Class, DatatypeProperty, ObjectProperty, Builtin, Rule, Atom, Var, Literal.',
  '- Allowed relationships: HAS_BODY, HAS_HEAD, REFERS_TO, ARG.',
  '- Every node MUST include project and graph properties.',
  '- graph = OntoGraph for Class, DatatypeProperty, ObjectProperty.',
  '- graph = Metagraph for Rule, Atom, Builtin, Var, Literal.',
  '',
  'NODE KEY PROPERTIES:',
  '- Rule key: Rule_Id (format R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_<LIMIT>_V).',
  '- Atom key: Atom_Id (format {Rule_Id}_A{n} for body, {Rule_Id}_H{n} for head).',
  '- Class key: iri (prefix ex:).',
  '- DatatypeProperty key: iri (prefix ex:). Display property: SWRL_label (NOT label).',
  '- Builtin key: iri (prefix swrlb:).',
  '- Var key: name (?<varName>).',
  '- Literal key: lex + datatype.',
  '',
  'ATOM REQUIRED PROPERTIES: Atom_Id, type, iri, SWRL_label, project, graph.',
  'Atom types: ClassAtom, DataPropertyAtom, ObjectPropertyAtom, BuiltinAtom.',
  '',
  'SEMANTIC MAPPING (violation pattern):',
  '- "at most / maximum X" -> body uses swrlb:greaterThan(?val, X)',
  '- "at least / minimum X" -> body uses swrlb:lessThan(?val, X)',
  '- "equal to X" -> body uses swrlb:notEqual(?val, X)',
  '- "between min and max" -> emit TWO separate violation rules',
  'Body checks condition that BREAKS the rule; head sets violation flag to true.',
  '',
  'RELATIONSHIP PROPERTIES: backtick-quote reserved words: `order`, `pos`.',
  'IRI prefixes: ex: for domain terms, swrlb: for builtins.',
  'project = \'' + project + '\'',
  '',
  fewShot,
  '',
  'Now convert this rule (output ONLY the Cypher MERGE+SET statements, then stop):',
  rulesText
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...input, prompt } }];

parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={{ { "model": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_model, "prompt": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.prompt, "stream": false, "keep_alive": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_keep_alive, "options": { "num_predict": 2048, "temperature": 0.1 }, "stop": ["Now convert", "Example input", "


"] } }}
